mano_cua.result_summary: Bug confirmed via source code analysis. In model.ts tryAddCaption(), caption anchor is cloned with only 'offset' but missing the model's own origin (m.origin). For nested models with non-zero origin, caption position is incorrect — shifted by the model's origin amount. Fix changes path.clone(m.caption.anchor, offset) to path.clone(m.caption.anchor, point.add(m.origin, offset)).
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Monorepo TypeScript library (lerna + typescript@4.1.3 build chain). Playground available but requires full build pipeline. Bug is a single-line fix in packages/maker.js/src/core/model.ts — tryAddCaption function omits m.origin when computing caption anchor offset for nested models.
